[241:20]I always believed when I got censored,

[241:22]I said, we have to do the show at a loss

[241:25]because when you do content, it's all about conversion.

[241:30]The conversion is fixed.

[241:32]Conversion means how many eyeballs convert to sales.

[241:37]And if a million people see it,

[241:40]how many are gonna be engaged, watching, commenting,

[241:44]subscribing, and of those people,

[241:46]how many are gonna give you three bucks?

[241:47]How many of those people are gonna subscribe,

[241:49]buy a hat, buy a ticket, make a donation?

[241:53]The conversion rate is pretty stable.

[241:55]And there are things you can do to increase the rate,

[241:57]but not a ton.

[241:59]But the rate is a function of how many people overall.

[242:03]You know the numerator is how many people see you so the denominator you can't change it too much

[242:11]The denominator, which is how many people are converted to sales, you can increase it,

[242:16]but it's pretty inelastic and it can't go up too much.

[242:19]There's not a ton you could do to increase it.

[242:21]But the numerator, that's what you can change.
